tldr.title: AWS Bedrock to require sharing data with Anthropic for Mythos and future models
tldr.author: TomAnthony
bullets: Anthropic requires 30-day traffic retention for Claude Fable 5, Mythos 5, and future high-capability models hosted on AWS Bedrock.
Opting into retention means customer data leaves AWSвЂ™s security boundary, impacting compliance and data sovereignty policies.
Anthropic retains the data to detect abuse patterns, deleting it after 30 days unless flagged for safety or legal investigations.
